resources.string: A new eye opens on the spine and blesses the shape that failed.
NEW EYE OPENS ON THE SPINE. THE FAILED SHAPE IS BLESSED.

Soft tendrils press through the seams of armor like eager brushstrokes. Feathers grow bright enough to cut. Bones loosen, choose new angles, and sing as they fuse anew. The scream is pain and gratitude braided together. Do not call it deformity. A fixed body is a prison for unborn miracles, and this flesh has finally learned to become art.
TENDRILS PRESS THROUGH ARMOR. FEATHERS CUT. BONES CHOOSE NEW ANGLES. PAIN AND GRATITUDE SCREAM TOGETHER. FLESH BECOMES ART.
